title: wedelia tenuifolia
intro: Wedelia tenuifolia, also known as the narrow-leafed Wedelia or florist's primrose, is a flowering plant species native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia tenuifolia include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. Wedelia tenuifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and topical creams.
